title: EvidenceArtifact
description: A raw evidence file captured during a scan: response body, headers, screenshot, PoC HTML, etc. Initially pointer + hash only. Phase 2 will mirror files to Supabase Storage and populate cloud_url.

scan_id.description: The scan that produced this artifact.

local_path.description: Absolute path on the originating Mac. Provenance / audit trail. Survives even after cloud_url is populated.

cloud_url.description: Supabase Storage URL once uploaded. Null until Phase 2 uploader runs.

preview_4kb.description: Optional first 4KB of content for inline previews. Plain-text only; never populated for binary.
